rules.descriptionKo: 2-4 sentences, scenario-focused, searchable Korean terms included
rules.keywords: 6-20 items, mixed KO/EN terms, include intent words
rules.props: runtime props names only, no type annotations
rules.category: Use stable taxonomy such as Dialog/Popup, List/Selection, Picker/Selection, Progress/Loading, Control/Input

ingestSamples.name: CM_DIALOG_ICON_BUTTONS
ingestSamples.descriptionKo: 아이콘과 설명, 하단 1~2개 버튼을 포함한 확인 다이얼로그 위젯입니다. 설명 줄 수에 따라 상하 여백이 자동 조정되어 좁은 화면에서도 가독성을 유지합니다. 확인/취소, 경고 안내, 설정 적용 확인 같은 의사결정 화면에 적합합니다.
ingestSamples.descriptionEn: Confirmation dialog with icon, message, and one or two action buttons. Spacing adapts to message length for compact displays.

ingestSamples.name: CM_LIST_SINGLE_SELECT
ingestSamples.descriptionKo: 단일 선택(라디오 스타일) 목록 위젯입니다. 현재 선택 항목은 체크 아이콘으로 표시되며 비활성 항목은 회색으로 렌더링됩니다. 옵션 1개를 고르는 설정 화면에서 사용됩니다.
ingestSamples.descriptionEn: Single-selection vertical list with a selected marker icon and disabled-state rendering.

ingestSamples.name: CM_PICKER_VERTICAL_VALUE
ingestSamples.descriptionKo: 3개 슬롯 기반 수직 피커로, 선택 변경 시 하단 값 라벨이 페이드 전환됩니다. 중앙 선택 항목 강조와 곡선형 오프셋 애니메이션을 지원합니다. 시간/온도/강도 같은 단계형 값을 설정할 때 적합합니다.
ingestSamples.descriptionEn: Three-slot vertical picker with fading value label transitions and centered selection emphasis.

ingestSamples.name: CM_PROGRESS_SPINNER
ingestSamples.descriptionKo: 회전 스피너와 설명 문구를 표시하는 로딩 위젯입니다. 네트워크 요청, 연산 처리, 전환 대기 상태를 사용자에게 명확하게 전달합니다. 설명 문구는 상황별로 동적으로 갱신 가능합니다.
ingestSamples.descriptionEn: Loading spinner widget with optional description text for processing and waiting states.

ingestSamples.name: WD_CLOCK_DIGITAL
ingestSamples.descriptionKo: AM/PM, 시각, 날짜를 대형 타이포그래피로 표시하는 디지털 시계 위젯입니다. 대기 화면에서 현재 시간을 빠르게 인지하도록 설계되었습니다. 테마 색상에 따라 AM/PM 강조색이 달라집니다.
ingestSamples.descriptionEn: Digital clock widget for idle screens with AM/PM indicator, large time text, and date.

components.name: CM_CTRL_BUTTON
components.descriptionKo: 포커스 상태를 지원하는 공통 버튼 위젯입니다. 포커스 시 배경과 텍스트 색이 반전되어 현재 선택 위치를 명확히 보여줍니다. 자동 너비 또는 고정 너비를 선택할 수 있어 다양한 버튼 레이아웃에 재사용할 수 있습니다.
components.descriptionEn: Common button widget with focus-state styling. Supports auto or fixed width and customizable shape/colors.
components.description: Common button widget with focus state styling. Displays text in a rounded capsule shape with automatic width adjustment or fixed width. Supports focus states with inverted colors: focused (white background/black text) vs unfocused (dark background/white text). Configurable dimensions, colors, and border radius.
components.visualForm: Rounded capsule button (default 52px height, 26px border radius) with centered text, background and text colors change on focus

components.name: CM_OVERLAY_TOAST
components.descriptionKo: 한 번에 하나의 토스트 메시지를 표시하는 오버레이 위젯입니다. 텍스트 줄 수에 따라 높이가 자동 조정되어 짧은 알림과 긴 안내 문구를 모두 처리할 수 있습니다. 시스템 상태 안내나 완료 메시지에 적합합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Single toast overlay with automatic height based on text lines. Suitable for status and completion feedback.
components.description: Single toast message display component with automatic height adjustment based on text line count. Supports format slots for dynamic text replacement. Dark gray background (#313137) with white centered text. Height varies: 1-2 lines (92px), 3-4 lines (120px), 5+ lines (150px).
components.visualForm: Horizontal bar (310px width, variable height) with dark gray background, centered white text (25px LGSBD font), supports multi-line text

components.name: CM_OVERLAY_TOAST_QUEUE
components.descriptionKo: 여러 토스트 메시지를 큐로 관리해 순차 표시하는 오버레이 위젯입니다. 하단에서 슬라이드 인/아웃 애니메이션으로 자연스럽게 알림을 전달합니다. 동시 다발적인 이벤트 알림을 누락 없이 보여줄 때 유용합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Toast queue manager that displays pending notifications sequentially with slide-up/down motion.
components.description: Toast notification queue manager with slide-up animations. Manages multiple sequential toast messages with automatic queuing. Animates from bottom with 500ms slide-in, holds for duration, then 500ms slide-out. Supports keyboard interaction and duration customization.
components.visualForm: Container (310x240px) at screen bottom where toast messages slide up from bottom edge, pause, then slide back down

components.name: CM_OVERLAY_GUIDE
components.descriptionKo: 전체 화면을 덮는 가이드 메시지 오버레이 위젯입니다. 반투명 배경 위에 안내 텍스트를 표시해 사용자의 주의를 집중시킵니다. 자동 닫힘 또는 사용자 액션 기반 닫힘 흐름 모두에 활용 가능합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Full-screen guide overlay with dimmed background and centered instruction text.
components.description: Full-screen overlay guide message component with semi-transparent dark background. Displays centered guide text with fade-in/fade-out animations (167ms). Can auto-dismiss after duration or require manual dismissal. Supports keyboard interaction and multi-line text.
components.visualForm: Full-screen semi-transparent overlay (rgba(0,0,0,0.85)) with centered white text (25px), covers entire 310x240px area

components.name: CM_CTRL_SWITCH
components.descriptionKo: ON/OFF 상태를 전환하는 토글 스위치 위젯입니다. 둥근 트랙과 슬라이딩 노브로 현재 상태를 직관적으로 보여줍니다. 설정 화면에서 기능 활성/비활성 전환에 주로 사용됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Toggle switch widget with pill track and sliding knob for ON/OFF control.
components.description: Toggle switch component with ON/OFF states. Rounded pill-shaped track (55x30px) with sliding knob. Blue background with white circular knob that slides between left (OFF) and right (ON) positions. Supports click interaction and disabled states.
components.visualForm: Rounded pill switch (55x30px) with white circular knob (24px) that slides horizontally, blue track background

components.name: CM_TITLE_BAR
components.description: Simple title bar widget for displaying centered screen titles. Fixed at top of screen (320x36px), white text (30px semibold) on transparent background. Standard header component used across many screens.
components.visualForm: Title bar strip (320x36px) at screen top with centered white text (30px)
components.descriptionKo: 화면 상단에 고정되는 공통 타이틀 바 위젯입니다. 320x36px 크기로 투명 배경 위에 흰색 30px 세미볼드 텍스트를 중앙 정렬해 표시합니다. 다양한 화면에서 표준 헤더로 재사용됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Simple title bar widget for displaying centered screen titles. Fixed at top of screen (320x36px), white text (30px semibold) on transparent background. Standard header component used across many screens.

components.name: CM_DIALOG_ICON_BUTTONS
components.description: Confirmation dialog with info icon, description text, and 1-2 action buttons at bottom. Dynamic layout adjusts spacing based on description line count. Buttons support left/right navigation with focus states. Info icon (62px) centered with description below and buttons at bottom.
components.visualForm: Centered dialog layout: info icon (62x62px) at top, multi-line description text (25px) in middle, 1-2 horizontal buttons (52px height) at bottom with 12px gap
components.descriptionKo: 정보 아이콘, 설명 텍스트, 최대 2개의 액션 버튼으로 구성된 확인 다이얼로그입니다. 설명 줄 수에 따라 레이아웃이 동적으로 조정되며, 좌우 방향키로 버튼 포커스를 이동할 수 있습니다.
components.descriptionEn: Confirmation dialog with info icon, description text, and 1-2 action buttons at bottom. Dynamic layout adjusts spacing based on description line count. Buttons support left/right navigation with focus states. Info icon (62px) centered with description below and buttons at bottom.

components.name: CM_DIALOG_TEXT_BUTTONS
components.description: Confirmation screen with centered description and two horizontal action buttons. Simpler than Core_CM_Confirmation (no icon). Buttons have rounded corners (24px radius), support focus states, and can be navigated with arrow keys. Description centered above buttons.
components.visualForm: Vertically centered layout: description text at top, two rounded buttons (40px height default, 132px min width) in horizontal row below
components.descriptionKo: 설명 텍스트와 두 개의 가로형 액션 버튼으로 구성된 확인 화면입니다. 아이콘 없이 단순하게 구성되며, 24px 모서리 둥근 버튼을 방향키로 탐색할 수 있습니다.
components.descriptionEn: Confirmation screen with centered description and two horizontal action buttons. Simpler than Core_CM_Confirmation (no icon). Buttons have rounded corners (24px radius), support focus states, and can be navigated with arrow keys. Description centered above buttons.

components.name: CM_DIALOG_DESC_ONLY
components.description: Simple screen with title bar (with back arrow) and centered description text only. No buttons or additional UI elements. Useful for displaying information or instructions without user action. Supports keyboard back navigation.
components.visualForm: Title bar at top (with back arrow), large centered description area (190px height) below title for multi-line text (25px)
components.descriptionKo: 뒤로 가기 화살표가 있는 타이틀 바와 중앙 정렬된 설명 텍스트만 표시하는 단순 화면입니다. 버튼이나 추가 UI 없이 정보나 안내를 표시할 때 사용하며, 키보드 뒤로 가기를 지원합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Simple screen with title bar (with back arrow) and centered description text only. No buttons or additional UI elements. Useful for displaying information or instructions without user action. Supports keyboard back navigation.

components.name: CM_DIALOG_SCROLL_DESC
components.description: Screen with title bar, scrollable description area, and 1-2 action buttons at bottom. Description area supports vertical scrolling with up/down arrow keys. Gradient masks at top and bottom indicate scrollable content. Buttons use same styling as Core_CM_Confirmation.
components.visualForm: Three sections: title bar with back arrow (50px), scrollable content area (128px) with gradient masks, button row at bottom (62px height)
components.descriptionKo: 타이틀 바, 스크롤 가능한 설명 영역, 하단 1~2개 액션 버튼으로 구성된 화면입니다. 상하 방향키로 설명을 스크롤하며, 상하 그라디언트 마스크로 스크롤 가능 여부를 시각적으로 안내합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Screen with title bar, scrollable description area, and 1-2 action buttons at bottom. Description area supports vertical scrolling with up/down arrow keys. Gradient masks at top and bottom indicate scrollable content. Buttons use same styling as Core_CM_Confirmation.

components.name: CM_DIALOG_ICON
components.description: Simple dialog with centered icon and description text. No title or buttons. Icon (62x62px) displays info/warning/check status. Gap between icon and text adjusts based on text line count (16px for ≤2 lines, 6px for 3+ lines). Minimal centered layout.
components.visualForm: Vertically centered: info icon (62x62px) with description text (25px) below, gap varies by text length
components.descriptionKo: 아이콘과 설명 텍스트만 표시하는 단순 다이얼로그입니다. 타이틀이나 버튼 없이 정보/경고/완료 상태 아이콘(62px)과 설명을 중앙 정렬로 보여주며, 텍스트 줄 수에 따라 간격이 자동 조정됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Simple dialog with centered icon and description text. No title or buttons. Icon (62x62px) displays info/warning/check status. Gap between icon and text adjusts based on text line count (16px for ≤2 lines, 6px for 3+ lines). Minimal centered layout.

components.name: CM_DIALOG_ICON_TITLE_DESC
components.description: Dialog with icon, title, and description in vertical arrangement. Icon at top (62px), followed by title (30px), then description (25px) with 6px gap. All content centered. No buttons. Used for informational displays.
components.visualForm: Vertically stacked centered content: icon (62x62px), title text (30px), description text (25px) with 6px spacing between title and description
components.descriptionKo: 아이콘, 타이틀, 설명을 세로 방향으로 배치한 다이얼로그입니다. 상단 아이콘(62px) → 타이틀(30px) → 설명(25px) 순으로 중앙 정렬되며, 버튼 없이 정보 표시 용도로 사용됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Dialog with icon, title, and description in vertical arrangement. Icon at top (62px), followed by title (30px), then description (25px) with 6px gap. All content centered. No buttons. Used for informational displays.

components.name: CM_DIALOG_CUSTOM_ICON
components.description: Similar to Core_CM_Dialogue_Icon_Title but with customizable icon source. Displays icon, optional title, and description vertically centered. Supports custom icon images via iconSrc prop. Keyboard handles BACK action only.
components.visualForm: Centered vertical layout: custom icon (62x62px), optional title (30px), description (25px) below with 6px gap
components.descriptionKo: 사용자 지정 아이콘을 지원하는 다이얼로그입니다. iconSrc prop으로 커스텀 이미지를 설정하며, 선택적 타이틀과 설명을 세로 중앙 정렬로 표시합니다. BACK 키만 처리합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Similar to Core_CM_Dialogue_Icon_Title but with customizable icon source. Displays icon, optional title, and description vertically centered. Supports custom icon images via iconSrc prop. Keyboard handles BACK action only.

components.name: CM_DIALOG_TEXT_ONLY
components.description: Minimal dialog showing only description text, no icon, title bar, or buttons. Text centered in specific vertical region (y=47px, height=145px). Simplest dialog variant for brief messages. Supports OK and BACK keyboard actions.
components.visualForm: Description text only (25px font) centered in middle region of screen, no other UI elements
components.descriptionKo: 설명 텍스트만 표시하는 최소 구성의 다이얼로그입니다. 아이콘, 타이틀, 버튼 없이 특정 세로 영역(y=47px, 높이 145px)에 텍스트를 중앙 정렬합니다. OK와 BACK 키를 지원합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Minimal dialog showing only description text, no icon, title bar, or buttons. Text centered in specific vertical region (y=47px, height=145px). Simplest dialog variant for brief messages. Supports OK and BACK keyboard actions.

components.name: CM_DIALOG_TITLE_DESC
components.description: Dialog with title bar at screen top and description in center region. Title displayed in fixed area (36px height) at top, description in center area (116px height starting at y=80px). No icon or buttons. Clean two-section layout.
components.visualForm: Two text sections: title bar at very top (36px height), description centered below (starting y=80px, 116px height)
components.descriptionKo: 화면 상단 타이틀 바와 중앙 설명 영역으로 구성된 다이얼로그입니다. 타이틀 고정 영역(36px)과 설명 영역(y=80px, 116px)으로 이루어진 깔끔한 2섹션 레이아웃입니다.
components.descriptionEn: Dialog with title bar at screen top and description in center region. Title displayed in fixed area (36px height) at top, description in center area (116px height starting at y=80px). No icon or buttons. Clean two-section layout.

components.name: CM_DIALOG_TITLE_ICON_STACK
components.description: Dialog combining icon, title, and description in centered vertical stack. Icon at top (62x62px), title below (30px), description at bottom (25px) with 6px gap. Supports custom icon source. Handles BACK keyboard action.
components.visualForm: Vertically centered: icon (62x62px) → title (30px) → description (25px), all centered with 6px gap between title and description
components.descriptionKo: 아이콘, 타이틀, 설명을 중앙 정렬 세로 스택으로 배치한 다이얼로그입니다. 커스텀 아이콘 소스를 지원하며 BACK 키를 처리합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Dialog combining icon, title, and description in centered vertical stack. Icon at top (62x62px), title below (30px), description at bottom (25px) with 6px gap. Supports custom icon source. Handles BACK keyboard action.

components.name: CM_DIALOG_TITLE_WIDE
components.description: Dialog with integrated title bar and large description area. Title in fixed bar (36px) at screen top, description fills remaining space (204px height). Maximizes description area while keeping title visible. Handles BACK action.
components.visualForm: Two sections: compact title bar at top (36px), large description area below (204px height) for extensive text content
components.descriptionKo: 타이틀 바와 넓은 설명 영역으로 구성된 다이얼로그입니다. 36px 타이틀 바 아래 204px 설명 영역을 최대한 활용해 긴 텍스트를 표시하며 BACK 키를 처리합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Dialog with integrated title bar and large description area. Title in fixed bar (36px) at screen top, description fills remaining space (204px height). Maximizes description area while keeping title visible. Handles BACK action.

components.name: CM_LIST_GRID
components.description: 2x2 grid view with pagination. Displays 4 items per page in 2-column layout. Each item shows label1 (28px white) and label2 (28px gray) stacked vertically. Supports keyboard navigation with arrows for grid movement and page switching. Page indicators at top show current page.
components.visualForm: 2x2 grid layout (2 columns × 2 rows), page indicators dots at top, navigation arrows on left/right sides, items with dual-line text
components.descriptionKo: 페이지네이션이 있는 2x2 그리드 뷰입니다. 페이지당 4개 항목을 2열로 표시하며, 각 항목은 label1과 label2를 세로로 쌓아 보여줍니다. 방향키로 그리드 탐색 및 페이지 전환이 가능합니다.
components.descriptionEn: 2x2 grid view with pagination. Displays 4 items per page in 2-column layout. Each item shows label1 (28px white) and label2 (28px gray) stacked vertically. Supports keyboard navigation with arrows for grid movement and page switching. Page indicators at top show current page.

components.name: CM_LIST_HORIZONTAL_CAROUSEL
components.description: Horizontal dynamic carousel picker with centered item and partial preview of adjacent items. Features smooth 300ms slide animations between items. Large centered text (49px) with fade masks on left/right edges. Optional title at top. Items arranged horizontally with 40px gaps.
components.visualForm: Horizontal scrolling carousel with large centered item (118px width), partial side items visible, gradient fade masks on edges, optional title bar
components.descriptionKo: 인접 항목이 부분 미리보기되는 수평 동적 캐러셀 피커입니다. 300ms 슬라이드 애니메이션과 좌우 페이드 마스크를 사용하며, 49px 대형 텍스트로 선택 항목을 중앙에 강조합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Horizontal dynamic carousel picker with centered item and partial preview of adjacent items. Features smooth 300ms slide animations between items. Large centered text (49px) with fade masks on left/right edges. Optional title at top. Items arranged horizontally with 40px gaps.

components.name: CM_LIST_HORIZONTAL_PAGER
components.description: Full-screen horizontal pager (320px per page) with smooth page transitions. Supports two variants: standard (large centered label + optional sub-label + optional command button) and 2nd depth (title/value/description layout). Dot indicators at top show page position.
components.visualForm: Full-width horizontal pages (320x240px each), page indicator dots at top (y=6px), smooth 300ms transitions, each page fills entire screen
components.descriptionKo: 부드러운 페이지 전환이 있는 전체 화면 수평 페이저입니다. 표준형(큰 레이블+서브레이블+버튼)과 2차 깊이(타이틀/값/설명) 두 가지 변형을 지원하며, 상단 점 인디케이터로 현재 위치를 표시합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Full-screen horizontal pager (320px per page) with smooth page transitions. Supports two variants: standard (large centered label + optional sub-label + optional command button) and 2nd depth (title/value/description layout). Dot indicators at top show page position.

components.name: CM_LIST_MULTI_SELECT
components.description: Vertical scrollable list with checkboxes (multiple selection). Each item shows checkbox icon, label, and optional description. Supports checked/unchecked/disabled states. Title bar with back arrow at top. Items are 68px height, scrollable viewport is 190px. Keyboard navigation for focus and toggle.
components.visualForm: Title bar (50px) → scrollable list area (190px) with checkbox items (68px each): checkbox icon | label text | optional description
components.descriptionKo: 체크박스를 사용하는 다중 선택 세로 스크롤 리스트입니다. 체크됨/미체크/비활성화 상태를 지원하며, 타이틀 바와 함께 68px 높이 항목들을 190px 뷰포트에서 키보드로 탐색하고 선택할 수 있습니다.
components.descriptionEn: Vertical scrollable list with checkboxes (multiple selection). Each item shows checkbox icon, label, and optional description. Supports checked/unchecked/disabled states. Title bar with back arrow at top. Items are 68px height, scrollable viewport is 190px. Keyboard navigation for focus and toggle.

components.name: CM_LIST_REORDER
components.description: Vertical scrollable list with drag handles for reordering items. Enter key starts reorder mode, arrows move item, Enter confirms, Escape cancels. Each item shows label and drag handle icon (right side). Title bar with back arrow. Items 68px height, viewport 190px.
components.visualForm: Title bar (50px) → scrollable list (190px) with items (68px): label text | drag handle icon on right, visual feedback during reorder
components.descriptionKo: 드래그 핸들로 항목 순서를 변경할 수 있는 세로 스크롤 리스트입니다. Enter로 순서 변경 모드 시작, 방향키로 이동, Enter로 확인, Escape로 취소하는 흐름으로 동작합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Vertical scrollable list with drag handles for reordering items. Enter key starts reorder mode, arrows move item, Enter confirms, Escape cancels. Each item shows label and drag handle icon (right side). Title bar with back arrow. Items 68px height, viewport 190px.

components.name: CM_LIST_SINGLE_SELECT
components.description: Vertical scrollable list with single selection (radio-style). Selected item shows blue checkmark icon. Items can be enabled/disabled (gray when disabled). Title bar with back arrow. Items 68px height, scrollable viewport 190px. Keyboard navigation and selection.
components.visualForm: Title bar (50px) → scrollable list (190px) with items (68px): checkmark icon (if selected) | label text, disabled items shown in gray
components.descriptionKo: 라디오 방식의 단일 선택 세로 스크롤 리스트입니다. 선택된 항목에 파란색 체크마크가 표시되며, 비활성화 항목은 회색으로 나타납니다. 타이틀 바와 함께 190px 뷰포트에서 68px 항목을 표시합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Vertical scrollable list with single selection (radio-style). Selected item shows blue checkmark icon. Items can be enabled/disabled (gray when disabled). Title bar with back arrow. Items 68px height, scrollable viewport 190px. Keyboard navigation and selection.

components.name: CM_PICKER_HORIZONTAL_SEL
components.description: Horizontal scrolling picker with centered selection item. Supports two modes: single selection (no checkbox) and multiple selection (with checkboxes). Large text (49px) for items, smooth 300ms scroll animation. Optional title at top. Centered item is focused/selected.
components.visualForm: Horizontal picker: optional title → scrolling items (118px width, 168px height area) with centered selection, optional checkboxes above text
components.descriptionKo: 중앙 선택 항목이 있는 수평 스크롤 피커입니다. 단일 선택(체크박스 없음)과 다중 선택(체크박스 포함) 두 가지 모드를 지원하며, 49px 대형 텍스트와 300ms 스크롤 애니메이션을 사용합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Horizontal scrolling picker with centered selection item. Supports two modes: single selection (no checkbox) and multiple selection (with checkboxes). Large text (49px) for items, smooth 300ms scroll animation. Optional title at top. Centered item is focused/selected.

components.name: CM_PICKER_VERTICAL
components.description: Vertical scrolling picker with 3 visible items and centered selection. Item height 94px, supports title and optional value fields. Value only shown for selected item. Divider lines above/below selection area. Mask overlay for gradient effect. Smooth 300ms scrolling.
components.visualForm: Three item slots (94px each) with horizontal dividers at y=71 and y=167, centered item highlighted, gradient mask overlay, optional value text below title
components.descriptionKo: 3개 항목이 표시되는 중앙 선택 세로 스크롤 피커입니다. 94px 높이 항목, 선택 항목에만 표시되는 값, 상하 구분선과 그라디언트 마스크를 사용하며 300ms 부드러운 스크롤을 지원합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Vertical scrolling picker with 3 visible items and centered selection. Item height 94px, supports title and optional value fields. Value only shown for selected item. Divider lines above/below selection area. Mask overlay for gradient effect. Smooth 300ms scrolling.

components.name: CM_PICKER_VERTICAL_TITLED
components.description: Vertical picker with title bar and 3 visible items. Similar to Core_CM_picker_Ver but with integrated title at top (36px). Items are 68px height, supports small font variant. Dividers at top/bottom of selection area. Gradient mask (5px left offset).
components.visualForm: Title bar (36px) → picker area (204px) with 3 item slots (68px each), horizontal dividers at selection boundaries, gradient mask overlay
components.descriptionKo: 상단 타이틀 바(36px)와 3개 항목을 표시하는 세로 피커입니다. 68px 높이 항목, 소형 폰트 변형, 선택 영역 상하 구분선과 그라디언트 마스크를 포함합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Vertical picker with title bar and 3 visible items. Similar to Core_CM_picker_Ver but with integrated title at top (36px). Items are 68px height, supports small font variant. Dividers at top/bottom of selection area. Gradient mask (5px left offset).

components.name: CM_PICKER_VERTICAL_VALUE
components.description: Vertical picker with value label that fades in/out on selection change. Shows title in picker items (36px) and value below (30px) when selected. Value fades out (150ms), updates, then fades in on scroll. Curved offset animation for previous/next items (+9px/-10px/-19px).
components.visualForm: Three item picker with title texts (36px), fixed value label below center (30px) with fade animation, subtle curved arrangement, dividers and mask
components.descriptionKo: 선택 변경 시 페이드 인/아웃 되는 값 레이블이 있는 세로 피커입니다. 선택 항목의 타이틀(36px)과 값(30px)을 표시하며, 이전/다음 항목에 곡선 오프셋 애니메이션을 적용합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Vertical picker with value label that fades in/out on selection change. Shows title in picker items (36px) and value below (30px) when selected. Value fades out (150ms), updates, then fades in on scroll. Curved offset animation for previous/next items (+9px/-10px/-19px).

components.name: CM_PROGRESS_BAR
components.description: Horizontal progress bar with title, large time display, and visual progress indicator. Shows hours and minutes in large font (87px) with units (25px). Progress bar animates across 320px width using translateX formula. Bottom description and label texts. Supports unit customization.
components.visualForm: Vertical layout: title at top → large time display (87px digits + 25px units) → progress bar (y=149px) → bottom labels and description
components.descriptionKo: 타이틀, 대형 시간 표시, 시각적 진행 표시줄을 갖춘 수평 프로그레스 바입니다. 시간/분을 87px 대형 폰트로 표시하며, translateX 공식으로 320px 너비 애니메이션을 구현합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Horizontal progress bar with title, large time display, and visual progress indicator. Shows hours and minutes in large font (87px) with units (25px). Progress bar animates across 320px width using translateX formula. Bottom description and label texts. Supports unit customization.

components.name: CM_PROGRESS_SPINNER
components.description: Loading spinner widget with rotating 50-frame animation (blue spinner, 62x62px). Optional description text below spinner (25px). Spinner positioned at top-center area, label below. Continuous rotation animation for loading/processing states.
components.visualForm: Centered layout: animated loading spinner (62x62px) at top, description text (25px) below spinner, black background
components.descriptionKo: 50프레임 회전 애니메이션(파란색, 62x62px)을 가진 로딩 스피너 위젯입니다. 스피너 아래 선택적 설명 텍스트(25px)를 표시하며, 로딩/처리 중 상태에서 지속 회전합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Loading spinner widget with rotating 50-frame animation (blue spinner, 62x62px). Optional description text below spinner (25px). Spinner positioned at top-center area, label below. Continuous rotation animation for loading/processing states.

components.name: CM_LIST_VERTICAL
components.description: Complete vertical list screen assembly with title bar, scrollable list view, and gradient masks. Combines TitleWithArrow and VerticalListView components. Gradient masks at top and bottom indicate scrollable content. Standard layout for list-based screens.
components.visualForm: Title bar with back arrow (50px) → scrollable list area (190px) → top/bottom gradient masks for scroll indication
components.descriptionKo: 타이틀 바, 스크롤 가능한 리스트 뷰, 그라디언트 마스크를 결합한 완전한 세로 리스트 화면입니다. TitleWithArrow와 VerticalListView를 조합해 리스트 기반 화면의 표준 레이아웃을 제공합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Complete vertical list screen assembly with title bar, scrollable list view, and gradient masks. Combines TitleWithArrow and VerticalListView components. Gradient masks at top and bottom indicate scrollable content. Standard layout for list-based screens.

components.name: CM_LIST_ITEM_FULL
components.description: Versatile list item component supporting multiple configurations: left icons (checkbox/radio/handle), main label with optional description, right elements (sub-label/switch/reorder indicator). Height 68px. Supports enabled/disabled states, selection highlighting. Base component for various list types.
components.visualForm: Horizontal layout (320x68px): [optional left icon 32px] | [label + description area] | [optional right element/label] with selection background
components.descriptionKo: 좌측 아이콘(체크박스/라디오/핸들), 메인 레이블+설명, 우측 요소(서브레이블/스위치/순서변경)를 조합 가능한 다목적 리스트 항목 컴포넌트입니다. 높이 68px, 활성/비활성 상태와 선택 하이라이트를 지원합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Versatile list item component supporting multiple configurations: left icons (checkbox/radio/handle), main label with optional description, right elements (sub-label/switch/reorder indicator). Height 68px. Supports enabled/disabled states, selection highlighting. Base component for various list types.

components.name: CM_LIST_VERTICAL2COL
components.description: Two-column vertical list screen with title bar and VerticalListView2nd. Similar structure to Core_CM_Ver_List but uses 2-column item layout. Includes gradient masks and standard navigation. For displaying paired or comparative information.
components.visualForm: Title bar with back arrow (50px) → scrollable 2-column list area (190px) → gradient masks
components.descriptionKo: 타이틀 바와 2열 리스트 뷰를 갖춘 세로 리스트 화면입니다. 그라디언트 마스크와 표준 탐색을 포함하며, 쌍을 이루거나 비교가 필요한 정보 표시에 적합합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Two-column vertical list screen with title bar and VerticalListView2nd. Similar structure to Core_CM_Ver_List but uses 2-column item layout. Includes gradient masks and standard navigation. For displaying paired or comparative information.

components.name: CM_LIST_SWITCH_LIST
components.description: Vertical scrollable list where each item has a toggle switch. Items show label and switch on right. Switches can be ON (0), OFF (1), or Hidden (2). Manages internal toggle states. Title bar with optional back arrow. Items 68px height, container 190px.
components.visualForm: Title bar (optional) → scrollable list area (190px) with items (68px): label text | toggle switch on right side
components.descriptionKo: 각 항목에 토글 스위치가 달린 세로 스크롤 리스트입니다. 스위치는 ON(0)/OFF(1)/숨김(2) 상태를 지원하며 내부 상태를 관리합니다. 68px 항목과 190px 컨테이너를 사용합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Vertical scrollable list where each item has a toggle switch. Items show label and switch on right. Switches can be ON (0), OFF (1), or Hidden (2). Manages internal toggle states. Title bar with optional back arrow. Items 68px height, container 190px.

components.name: CM_CTRL_SLIDER_CONTINUOUS
components.description: Continuous value slider screen with title bar, large value display, and slider control. Value shown in large font (42px) in center area. Slider positioned at bottom (146px from top). Supports min/max/step configuration. Arrow keys adjust value, Enter confirms.
components.visualForm: Title bar with back arrow → large value display (42px) in center → slider control (244px width) at bottom (y=146)
components.descriptionKo: 타이틀 바, 대형 값 표시(42px), 슬라이더 컨트롤을 갖춘 연속 값 슬라이더 화면입니다. min/max/step 설정과 방향키 조작을 지원하며 Enter 키로 값을 확인합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Continuous value slider screen with title bar, large value display, and slider control. Value shown in large font (42px) in center area. Slider positioned at bottom (146px from top). Supports min/max/step configuration. Arrow keys adjust value, Enter confirms.

components.name: CM_CTRL_SLIDER_DISCRETE
components.description: Discrete level slider (segments instead of continuous). Shows title, current level value text, and segmented bar indicator. 5 segments (44px each) with 50px spacing. Active segments shown in primary color, inactive in track color. Arrow keys change level.
components.visualForm: Title bar with back arrow → value text display (42px) → segmented bar (5 segments × 44px, 5px height) at y=150px
components.descriptionKo: 세그먼트 방식의 이산 레벨 슬라이더입니다. 5개 세그먼트(각 44px)로 구성된 바와 타이틀, 현재 레벨 텍스트를 표시하며, 활성 세그먼트는 주색상으로 강조됩니다. 방향키로 레벨을 변경합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Discrete level slider (segments instead of continuous). Shows title, current level value text, and segmented bar indicator. 5 segments (44px each) with 50px spacing. Active segments shown in primary color, inactive in track color. Arrow keys change level.

components.name: CM_PICKER_NUMERIC_CAROUSEL
components.description: Horizontal numeric picker with title, 3 visible values, and unit label with fade effect. Values slide left/right (500ms animation). Center value is emphasized. Unit label fades out during transitions. Supports configurable start/end/stride values. Infinite scroll picker design.
components.visualForm: Title at top → three horizontal value slots (118px each) with center emphasis → unit label with fade transitions
components.descriptionKo: 3개의 숫자 값이 수평으로 표시되는 무한 스크롤 숫자 피커입니다. 500ms 슬라이드 애니메이션, 전환 시 페이드 아웃되는 단위 레이블, 중앙 강조 값을 특징으로 합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Horizontal numeric picker with title, 3 visible values, and unit label with fade effect. Values slide left/right (500ms animation). Center value is emphasized. Unit label fades out during transitions. Supports configurable start/end/stride values. Infinite scroll picker design.

components.name: CM_ANIM_DIGIT
components.description: Animated single digit component with vertical slide transitions. Shows current digit with smooth slide animation when value changes (667ms ease-in-out). Direction determines slide up or down. Supports negative values (displays hyphen). Uses 87px font with 85px cell height.
components.visualForm: Single digit cell (85px height) with translating number that slides vertically when changing, three-slot animation system (previous/current/next)
components.descriptionKo: 세로 슬라이드 전환 애니메이션이 있는 단일 숫자 컴포넌트입니다. 값 변경 시 667ms ease-in-out 애니메이션으로 숫자가 위/아래로 슬라이드하며 전환됩니다. 87px 폰트와 85px 셀 높이를 사용합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Animated single digit component with vertical slide transitions. Shows current digit with smooth slide animation when value changes (667ms ease-in-out). Direction determines slide up or down. Supports negative values (displays hyphen). Uses 87px font with 85px cell height.

components.name: CM_ANIM_SEQUENCE
components.description: Core image sequence player that cycles through array of images at fixed intervals. Supports repeat mode (infinite loop) or single play with completion callback. Calculates frame duration by dividing total duration by frame count. Basic building block for animations.
components.visualForm: Container (customizable width/height) displaying sequential images with timed transitions, images scaled to fit
components.descriptionKo: 이미지 배열을 일정 간격으로 순환 재생하는 핵심 이미지 시퀀스 플레이어입니다. 무한 반복 또는 단일 재생 후 완료 콜백을 지원하며, 다양한 애니메이션 구현의 기본 빌딩 블록입니다.
components.descriptionEn: Core image sequence player that cycles through array of images at fixed intervals. Supports repeat mode (infinite loop) or single play with completion callback. Calculates frame duration by dividing total duration by frame count. Basic building block for animations.

components.name: CM_ANIM_SEQUENCE_PLAYER
components.description: Advanced playlist-based image sequence player. Plays multiple sequences in order with individual durations and repeat settings. Auto-advances to next item on completion. Supports item-specific dimensions. Calls onComplete when entire playlist finishes.
components.visualForm: Black background container (100% size) playing sequential animation playlists, each with configurable dimensions and loop settings
components.descriptionKo: 플레이리스트 기반 고급 이미지 시퀀스 플레이어입니다. 여러 시퀀스를 순서대로 재생하며 개별 재생 시간과 반복 설정을 지원합니다. 전체 플레이리스트 완료 시 onComplete를 호출합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Advanced playlist-based image sequence player. Plays multiple sequences in order with individual durations and repeat settings. Auto-advances to next item on completion. Supports item-specific dimensions. Calls onComplete when entire playlist finishes.

components.name: CM_ANIM_INTRO_LOOP
components.description: Two-phase animation player: intro sequence (plays once) → loop sequence (repeats infinitely). Automatically transitions from intro to loop on completion. If no intro provided, starts with loop immediately. Useful for splash screens and idle animations.
components.visualForm: Full-size container playing intro animation once, then seamlessly transitioning to looping animation
components.descriptionKo: 인트로 시퀀스(1회 재생) → 루프 시퀀스(무한 반복) 2단계 애니메이션 플레이어입니다. 인트로 완료 후 자동으로 루프로 전환되며, 스플래시 화면이나 대기 애니메이션에 적합합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Two-phase animation player: intro sequence (plays once) → loop sequence (repeats infinitely). Automatically transitions from intro to loop on completion. If no intro provided, starts with loop immediately. Useful for splash screens and idle animations.

components.name: WD_CLOCK_ANALOG
components.description: Analog clock widget with rotating hands and circular hour digits. Shows hour/minute/second hands rotating around center. Current hour digit highlighted. Supports theme colors (blue/orange). Hour positions arranged in circle pattern. Hands rotate smoothly with proper angles.
components.visualForm: Circular analog clock face (320x240) with three rotating hands (hour/minute/second), hour digit at current position, theme-colored hour hand
components.descriptionKo: 회전하는 핸드와 원형으로 배열된 시각 숫자가 있는 아날로그 시계 위젯입니다. 시/분/초 핸드가 중심을 기준으로 회전하며 현재 시각 숫자를 강조합니다. 파란색/주황색 테마를 지원합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Analog clock widget with rotating hands and circular hour digits. Shows hour/minute/second hands rotating around center. Current hour digit highlighted. Supports theme colors (blue/orange). Hour positions arranged in circle pattern. Hands rotate smoothly with proper angles.

components.name: WD_CLOCK_DIGITAL
components.description: Digital clock widget showing time in large format (HH:MM) with AM/PM indicator and date. AM shown in orange, PM in blue. Time displayed in extra-large LOCK3B23 font (86px). Date shown below (24px). Simple centered layout.
components.visualForm: Centered digital display: AM/PM text (24px, colored) → large time (86px) → date text (24px) below
components.descriptionKo: AM/PM 표시와 날짜가 포함된 대형 포맷(HH:MM) 디지털 시계 위젯입니다. AM은 주황색, PM은 파란색으로 표시되며, 86px 초대형 LOCK3B23 폰트로 시간을 보여줍니다.
components.descriptionEn: Digital clock widget showing time in large format (HH:MM) with AM/PM indicator and date. AM shown in orange, PM in blue. Time displayed in extra-large LOCK3B23 font (86px). Date shown below (24px). Simple centered layout.

components.name: CM_LABEL_FORMATTED
components.description: Advanced formatted label with slot-based templating. Supports format strings with {0}, {1} placeholders for STRING/IMAGE/NUMBER slots. Auto font fitting (scales down if overflow), scroll mode if fitting fails (horizontal/vertical). 2-second delay before scrolling. Wrap-around scrolling with masks.
components.visualForm: Flexible text/image container with auto-sizing, scrolling text when too long, gradient masks during scroll, inline images and styled slots
components.descriptionKo: 슬롯 기반 템플릿이 있는 고급 포맷 레이블입니다. 플레이스홀더로 STRING/IMAGE/NUMBER 슬롯을 지원하며, 자동 폰트 축소 및 수평/수직 스크롤 모드를 제공합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Advanced formatted label with slot-based templating. Supports format strings with {0}, {1} placeholders for STRING/IMAGE/NUMBER slots. Auto font fitting (scales down if overflow), scroll mode if fitting fails (horizontal/vertical). 2-second delay before scrolling. Wrap-around scrolling with masks.

components.name: CM_LABEL_SMART
components.description: Smart label with automatic font fitting and scrolling. Attempts to fit text by reducing font size (minimum calculated from base). If still doesn't fit, enters scroll mode (horizontal for single-line, vertical for multi-line). 2-second delay before scroll starts. Wrap-around scrolling with gradient masks.
components.visualForm: Text container that auto-scales font or scrolls if needed, gradient fade masks during scrolling, alignment-aware positioning
components.descriptionKo: 자동 폰트 축소와 스크롤 기능이 있는 스마트 레이블입니다. 텍스트가 넘칠 경우 폰트를 줄이고, 그래도 부족하면 스크롤 모드(단일행: 수평, 다중행: 수직)로 전환합니다. 2초 지연 후 스크롤을 시작합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Smart label with automatic font fitting and scrolling. Attempts to fit text by reducing font size (minimum calculated from base). If still doesn't fit, enters scroll mode (horizontal for single-line, vertical for multi-line). 2-second delay before scroll starts. Wrap-around scrolling with gradient masks.

components.name: CM_CTRL_SLIDER
components.description: Basic HTML range slider component with customizable min/max values and width. Uses browser default styling with white accent color. Simple continuous value selector. Touch-friendly 40px height. Returns integer values via onChange callback.
components.visualForm: Horizontal slider track (customizable width, default 244px) with draggable thumb, 1px height track
components.descriptionKo: 기본 HTML range 슬라이더 컴포넌트입니다. min/max 값과 너비를 설정할 수 있으며, 흰색 악센트의 브라우저 기본 스타일을 사용합니다. onChange 콜백으로 정수 값을 반환합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Basic HTML range slider component with customizable min/max values and width. Uses browser default styling with white accent color. Simple continuous value selector. Touch-friendly 40px height. Returns integer values via onChange callback.

components.name: CM_TITLE_WITH_ARROW
components.description: Standard title bar component with centered title text and optional back arrow. Arrow is clickable 100x50px area at left. Title is 30px semibold centered across full width. Black background, white text. Standard header for list and settings screens.
components.visualForm: Header bar (320x50px): back arrow icon on left (100x50px) | centered title text (30px white)
components.descriptionKo: 중앙 타이틀 텍스트와 선택적 뒤로 가기 화살표가 있는 표준 타이틀 바 컴포넌트입니다. 화살표는 100x50px 클릭 영역을 가지며, 리스트/설정 화면의 표준 헤더로 사용됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Standard title bar component with centered title text and optional back arrow. Arrow is clickable 100x50px area at left. Title is 30px semibold centered across full width. Black background, white text. Standard header for list and settings screens.

components.name: CM_PICKER_VERTICAL1ST
components.description: Infinite scroll vertical picker with 3 visible items (TOP, MID, LOW positions). Shows title, main text, and value for selected item. Value fades out/in (100ms/167ms) on selection change. Title visibility toggles based on selection (always visible at index 0 or if titleShowAlways=true). Supports enabled/disabled states.
components.visualForm: Optional title area → 3-item vertical picker stack with centered selection → fade-in/out value display → gradient mask overlay
components.descriptionKo: 3개 항목(TOP/MID/LOW 위치)이 보이는 무한 스크롤 세로 피커입니다. 선택 변경 시 값이 100ms/167ms 페이드 인/아웃되며, titleShowAlways 옵션으로 타이틀 표시를 제어합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Infinite scroll vertical picker with 3 visible items (TOP, MID, LOW positions). Shows title, main text, and value for selected item. Value fades out/in (100ms/167ms) on selection change. Title visibility toggles based on selection (always visible at index 0 or if titleShowAlways=true). Supports enabled/disabled states.

components.name: CM_PICKER_VERTICAL1ST_ITEM
components.description: Individual item for VerticalList1stDepth with position-based vertical offset animation. TOP position: +12px, MID: -19px (if has value) or 0px, LOW: -12px. Supports enabled/disabled states (gray when disabled). Text centered in 94px cell.
components.visualForm: Text item (300x94px) with position-based vertical offset, centered 36px white/gray text, smooth transitions
components.descriptionKo: 위치 기반 수직 오프셋 애니메이션이 있는 1차 세로 피커의 개별 항목입니다. TOP: +12px, MID: -19px(값 있을 때)/0px, LOW: -12px 오프셋이 적용되며, 비활성 상태(회색)를 지원합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Individual item for VerticalList1stDepth with position-based vertical offset animation. TOP position: +12px, MID: -19px (if has value) or 0px, LOW: -12px. Supports enabled/disabled states (gray when disabled). Text centered in 94px cell.

components.name: CM_PICKER_VERTICAL2ND
components.description: Second-depth vertical picker with title, unit label, and item list. Handles up/down navigation internally, delegates OK/LEFT/RIGHT/BACK to external handler. Shows title at top, dividers around selection area, optional unit label. Supports item-based unit hiding.
components.visualForm: Title bar (36px) → vertical picker with dividers (top: 104px, bottom: 172px) → optional unit label → gradient mask
components.descriptionKo: 타이틀, 단위 레이블, 항목 리스트를 갖춘 2차 깊이 세로 피커입니다. 상하 탐색은 내부에서 처리하고 OK/LEFT/RIGHT/BACK 키를 외부 핸들러로 위임합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Second-depth vertical picker with title, unit label, and item list. Handles up/down navigation internally, delegates OK/LEFT/RIGHT/BACK to external handler. Shows title at top, dividers around selection area, optional unit label. Supports item-based unit hiding.

components.name: CM_PICKER_VERTICAL2ND_ITEM
components.description: Item component for 2nd depth picker. Shows text with selection-based color transition (white when selected, gray when not). 40px LGSBD23 font, centered in cell. 300ms color transition for smooth selection changes.
components.visualForm: Centered text item with smooth color transition between white (selected) and gray (#cdcdcd) states, 40px font
components.descriptionKo: 2차 깊이 피커의 개별 항목 컴포넌트입니다. 선택 시 흰색, 미선택 시 회색으로 300ms 색상 전환 애니메이션이 적용됩니다. 40px LGSBD23 폰트를 사용합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Item component for 2nd depth picker. Shows text with selection-based color transition (white when selected, gray when not). 40px LGSBD23 font, centered in cell. 300ms color transition for smooth selection changes.

components.name: CM_LIST_ITEM
components.description: Basic vertical list item showing main label and optional description. Supports enabled/disabled states. Description shown below label (21px font vs 30px label). Width adjusts based on presence of right-side elements. Selection background highlight.
components.visualForm: List item (320x68px): label text (30px) + optional description (21px) below, white/gray colors based on enabled state
components.descriptionKo: 메인 레이블과 선택적 설명을 표시하는 기본 세로 리스트 항목입니다. 활성/비활성 상태를 지원하며, 설명은 레이블(30px) 아래에 21px 폰트로 표시됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Basic vertical list item showing main label and optional description. Supports enabled/disabled states. Description shown below label (21px font vs 30px label). Width adjusts based on presence of right-side elements. Selection background highlight.

components.name: CM_LIST_ITEM2COL
components.description: Two-column list item variant with label on left and value on right. Fixed widths: label area 170px, value area 130px. Supports enabled/disabled states. Both label and value can independently show enabled/disabled styling.
components.visualForm: Two-column item (320x68px): label (170px, left-aligned) | value (130px, right-aligned), both 30px font
components.descriptionKo: 좌측 레이블과 우측 값이 2열로 배치된 리스트 항목 변형입니다. 레이블 영역 170px, 값 영역 130px의 고정 너비를 사용하며, 각각 독립적인 활성/비활성 스타일을 지원합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Two-column list item variant with label on left and value on right. Fixed widths: label area 170px, value area 130px. Supports enabled/disabled states. Both label and value can independently show enabled/disabled styling.

components.name: CM_PICKER_VERTICAL_CORE
components.description: Core vertical picker component managing 3 visible items with smooth scroll transitions. Calculates CENTER_OFFSET for alignment, applies transform for scrolling. Wrapped by VerticalList2ndDepth for full screen integration.
components.visualForm: Three vertically stacked items (68px each) with smooth translateY scrolling, center item selection
components.descriptionKo: 3개 항목을 부드러운 스크롤로 관리하는 핵심 세로 피커 컴포넌트입니다. 정렬용 CENTER_OFFSET을 계산하고 translateY로 스크롤을 구현합니다. VerticalList2ndDepth에 래핑되어 사용됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Core vertical picker component managing 3 visible items with smooth scroll transitions. Calculates CENTER_OFFSET for alignment, applies transform for scrolling. Wrapped by VerticalList2ndDepth for full screen integration.

components.name: CM_LIST_SCROLL_VIEW
components.description: Scrollable vertical list view managing array of VerticalListItem components. Calculates scroll offset to keep focused item visible. Supports enabled/disabled items, selection highlighting, and keyboard navigation. Item height 68px, viewport 190px.
components.visualForm: Scrollable container (320x190px) with vertically stacked items (68px each), auto-scroll to keep selection visible
components.descriptionKo: VerticalListItem 배열을 관리하는 스크롤 가능한 세로 리스트 뷰입니다. 포커스된 항목이 항상 표시되도록 스크롤 오프셋을 자동 계산합니다. 68px 항목, 190px 뷰포트를 사용합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Scrollable vertical list view managing array of VerticalListItem components. Calculates scroll offset to keep focused item visible. Supports enabled/disabled items, selection highlighting, and keyboard navigation. Item height 68px, viewport 190px.

components.name: CM_LIST_SCROLL_VIEW2COL
components.description: Two-column vertical list view using VerticalListItem2nd components. Similar scrolling behavior to VerticalListView but with label/value column layout. Item height 68px, viewport 190px. Keyboard navigation and auto-scroll.
components.visualForm: Scrollable two-column list (320x190px) with items showing label | value pairs in 68px rows
components.descriptionKo: VerticalListItem2nd 컴포넌트를 사용하는 2열 세로 리스트 뷰입니다. VerticalListView와 동일한 스크롤 동작에 레이블/값 열 레이아웃을 추가합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Two-column vertical list view using VerticalListItem2nd components. Similar scrolling behavior to VerticalListView but with label/value column layout. Item height 68px, viewport 190px. Keyboard navigation and auto-scroll.

components.name: CM_PICKER_MASK2ND
components.description: Configurable mask/overlay component for 2nd depth picker screens. Supports multiple display modes: hidden, top-only, bottom-only, or both masks. Displays dimming overlays or visual indicators at top/bottom of picker area. Component for visual feedback.
components.visualForm: Conditional overlay masks at top/bottom of picker area based on mode setting
components.descriptionKo: 2차 깊이 피커 화면용 설정 가능한 마스크/오버레이 컴포넌트입니다. 숨김, 상단만, 하단만, 양쪽 마스크 표시 4가지 모드를 지원하며 피커 영역의 시각적 피드백을 제공합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Configurable mask/overlay component for 2nd depth picker screens. Supports multiple display modes: hidden, top-only, bottom-only, or both masks. Displays dimming overlays or visual indicators at top/bottom of picker area. Component for visual feedback.

components.name: WD_DIALOG_ACCESSORY
components.description: Accessory status display widget showing text message. Simple centered layout with NextLabelLite for displaying accessory-related information (e.g., 'Steam Generator Ready'). Keyboard interaction support.
components.visualForm: Centered text display (25px) for accessory status messages on black background
components.descriptionKo: 텍스트 메시지를 중앙 정렬로 표시하는 부속품 상태 위젯입니다. NextLabelLite를 사용해 부속품 관련 안내 정보를 표시합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Accessory status display widget showing text message. Simple centered layout with NextLabelLite for displaying accessory-related information (e.g., 'Steam Generator Ready'). Keyboard interaction support.

components.name: OV_COOK_AUTO_PAGER
components.description: Auto-cook mode horizontal pager using WD_Pager base component. Displays cooking modes across multiple pages with navigation. Shows mode labels and cycling through available auto-cook programs.
components.visualForm: Horizontal pager for auto-cook modes with page indicators and smooth transitions
components.descriptionKo: WD_Pager 기반의 오토 쿡 모드 수평 페이저입니다. 탐색 기능과 함께 여러 페이지에 걸쳐 자동 조리 모드를 표시하며, 사용 가능한 자동 조리 프로그램을 순환합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Auto-cook mode horizontal pager using WD_Pager base component. Displays cooking modes across multiple pages with navigation. Shows mode labels and cycling through available auto-cook programs.

components.name: CM_DISPLAY_BLACK
components.description: Simple full-black screen widget for screen-off state or transitions. Minimal component that renders black rectangle (310x240px). Used between screens or for power-saving display.
components.visualForm: Solid black rectangle (310x240px), no content or interaction
components.descriptionKo: 화면 오프 상태나 화면 전환에 사용되는 전체 검정 화면 위젯입니다. 310x240px 크기의 검정 사각형을 렌더링하며, 절전 디스플레이나 화면 간 전환 용도로 사용됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Simple full-black screen widget for screen-off state or transitions. Minimal component that renders black rectangle (310x240px). Used between screens or for power-saving display.

components.name: WD_ANIM_BOOT
components.description: Boot animation orchestrator managing multiple sequential ImageSequencePlayer playlists. Converts animation definitions into playlist format and plays them in order. Calls onReady when complete sequence finishes.
components.visualForm: Full-screen sequential animation player for boot sequences (ThinQ logo → product intro)
components.descriptionKo: 여러 순차 ImageSequencePlayer 플레이리스트를 관리하는 부팅 애니메이션 오케스트레이터입니다. 애니메이션 정의를 플레이리스트 형식으로 변환해 순서대로 재생하고, 완료 시 onReady를 호출합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Boot animation orchestrator managing multiple sequential ImageSequencePlayer playlists. Converts animation definitions into playlist format and plays them in order. Calls onReady when complete sequence finishes.

components.name: WD_ANIM_BOOT_UPGRADE
components.description: Firmware upgrade boot screen showing upgrade progress message. Displays centered text indicating system update in progress. Used during SOTA updates at boot time.
components.visualForm: Centered upgrade message text on black background during boot
components.descriptionKo: 업그레이드 진행 메시지를 표시하는 펌웨어 업그레이드 부팅 화면 위젯입니다. 시스템 업데이트 진행 중임을 안내하는 텍스트를 중앙에 표시하며, SOTA 업데이트 부팅 시 사용됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Firmware upgrade boot screen showing upgrade progress message. Displays centered text indicating system update in progress. Used during SOTA updates at boot time.

components.name: WD_ANIM_BOOT_SCREEN
components.description: Standard boot screen with logo animation and loading text. Shows animated logo playlist centered with status message below. Typical boot sequence component.
components.visualForm: Centered logo animation with optional loading text below
components.descriptionKo: 로고 애니메이션과 로딩 텍스트가 있는 표준 부팅 화면입니다. 중앙 정렬된 애니메이션 로고 플레이리스트와 하단 상태 메시지를 표시하는 일반적인 부팅 시퀀스 컴포넌트입니다.
components.descriptionEn: Standard boot screen with logo animation and loading text. Shows animated logo playlist centered with status message below. Typical boot sequence component.

components.name: WD_DIALOG_CHILD_LOCK
components.description: Child lock status display with lock icon animation and instruction text. Shows animated lock icon centered with text below indicating child lock is active. Keyboard interaction support.
components.visualForm: Centered lock icon animation (62x62px) with instruction text below (25px)
components.descriptionKo: 어린이 잠금 상태를 표시하는 잠금 아이콘 애니메이션과 안내 텍스트 위젯입니다. 어린이 잠금 활성화 시 중앙에 자물쇠 애니메이션 아이콘(62px)과 잠금 안내 문구를 표시합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Child lock status display with lock icon animation and instruction text. Shows animated lock icon centered with text below indicating child lock is active. Keyboard interaction support.

components.name: WD_CLOCK_IDLE
components.description: Clock idle screen showing current time, date, and optional energy saver icon. Large time display (LOCK3B23 font) with date below. Minimalist clock widget for idle/standby mode.
components.visualForm: Centered time display (large font) → date text below → optional energy icon at bottom or top
components.descriptionKo: 현재 시간, 날짜, 선택적 절전 아이콘을 표시하는 시계 대기 화면입니다. LOCK3B23 폰트로 대형 시간과 날짜를 보여주는 대기/절전 모드용 미니멀 시계 위젯입니다.
components.descriptionEn: Clock idle screen showing current time, date, and optional energy saver icon. Large time display (LOCK3B23 font) with date below. Minimalist clock widget for idle/standby mode.

components.name: OV_TITLE_2LINE
components.description: Two-line oven title component for oven-specific screens. Displays title text with proper formatting for oven UI style. Used in oven cooking mode displays.
components.visualForm: Two-line text title display formatted for oven interface styling
components.descriptionKo: 오븐 전용 화면의 2행 타이틀 컴포넌트입니다. 오븐 UI 스타일에 맞는 형식으로 타이틀과 서브타이틀 텍스트를 표시하며, 오븐 조리 모드 화면에서 활용됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Two-line oven title component for oven-specific screens. Displays title text with proper formatting for oven UI style. Used in oven cooking mode displays.

components.name: WD_CLOCK_SET_TIME
components.description: Clock setting widget using roller pickers for hour, minute, and AM/PM selection. Three WD_Roller components arranged horizontally. Title shows 'Set Clock' at top. Manages time selection state.
components.visualForm: Title bar → three horizontal roller pickers (hour | minute | AM/PM) for time setting
components.descriptionKo: 롤러 피커를 사용해 시/분/AM·PM을 설정하는 시계 설정 위젯입니다. 세 개의 WD_Roller 컴포넌트를 가로로 배치하며, 상단에 시계 설정 타이틀을 표시합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Clock setting widget using roller pickers for hour, minute, and AM/PM selection. Three WD_Roller components arranged horizontally. Title shows 'Set Clock' at top. Manages time selection state.

components.name: OV_DIALOG_TITLE_ICON
components.description: Dialog variant combining title text, centered content text, and optional icon. Used for oven-specific dialogs with icon support. Structured layout with title region and content area.
components.visualForm: Title area → centered icon (if provided) → content text below
components.descriptionKo: 타이틀 텍스트, 중앙 콘텐츠 텍스트, 선택적 아이콘을 결합한 오븐 전용 다이얼로그입니다. 타이틀 영역과 콘텐츠 영역으로 구성된 구조화된 레이아웃을 제공합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Dialog variant combining title text, centered content text, and optional icon. Used for oven-specific dialogs with icon support. Structured layout with title region and content area.

components.name: OV_COOK_FINISHED
components.description: Cooking completion screen for oven. Shows oven title, completion message, rotating finish images/animations, and completion sound. Content cycles through visual assets. Uses oven-specific styling.
components.visualForm: Oven title (2-line) → rotating completion visuals (images/animations) → completion text
components.descriptionKo: 오븐 조리 완료 화면입니다. 오븐 타이틀, 완료 메시지, 순환하는 완료 이미지/애니메이션, 완료 사운드를 표시하며, 오븐 전용 스타일과 비주얼 에셋을 사용합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Cooking completion screen for oven. Shows oven title, completion message, rotating finish images/animations, and completion sound. Content cycles through visual assets. Uses oven-specific styling.

components.name: OV_COOK_MODE_ITEM
components.description: Individual cooking mode item for oven mode selection. Displays mode name, temperature, icon. Used in WD_CookMode_Pager for showing available cooking programs.
components.visualForm: Cooking mode display: mode name → temperature → mode icon, centered layout
components.descriptionKo: 오븐 모드 선택용 개별 조리 모드 항목입니다. 모드 이름, 온도, 아이콘을 표시하며, WD_CookMode_Pager에서 사용 가능한 조리 프로그램을 보여줄 때 사용됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Individual cooking mode item for oven mode selection. Displays mode name, temperature, icon. Used in WD_CookMode_Pager for showing available cooking programs.

components.name: OV_COOK_MODE_PAGER
components.description: Horizontal pager for oven cooking modes using WD_Pager base. Each page shows WD_CookMode_Item with mode details. Horizontal navigation through available cooking programs.
components.visualForm: Horizontal pager displaying cooking mode items with smooth page transitions
components.descriptionKo: WD_Pager 기반의 오븐 조리 모드 수평 페이저입니다. 각 페이지에 WD_CookMode_Item과 모드 상세 정보를 표시하며, 수평 탐색으로 조리 프로그램을 선택할 수 있습니다.
components.descriptionEn: Horizontal pager for oven cooking modes using WD_Pager base. Each page shows WD_CookMode_Item with mode details. Horizontal navigation through available cooking programs.

components.name: WD_COURSE_LIST
components.description: Multi-page horizontal list of washing courses with smooth scrolling. Shows course items with indicators, page dots, and optional titles (Cloud Cycle, Additional Cycles). Energy saver icon when enabled. Complex navigation and state management.
components.visualForm: Horizontal scrolling course list with page indicators at top, course items showing options and icons, navigation arrows
components.descriptionKo: 부드러운 스크롤이 있는 다중 페이지 세탁 코스 수평 리스트입니다. 코스 항목, 페이지 점, 선택적 타이틀을 표시하며 절전 아이콘과 복잡한 탐색 및 상태 관리를 지원합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Multi-page horizontal list of washing courses with smooth scrolling. Shows course items with indicators, page dots, and optional titles (Cloud Cycle, Additional Cycles). Energy saver icon when enabled. Complex navigation and state management.

components.name: WD_COURSE_EDITOR
components.description: Scrollable vertical list for editing course favorites with checkboxes. Title bar at top, list items show checkbox state and course info. Manages internal toggle states. Mandatory courses cannot be unchecked.
components.visualForm: Title bar (CM_Title) → scrollable list of course items with checkboxes (68px height), gradient masks
components.descriptionKo: 체크박스로 코스 즐겨찾기를 편집하는 스크롤 가능한 세로 리스트입니다. 타이틀 바와 체크박스 상태가 표시된 코스 항목 리스트로 구성되며, 필수 코스는 체크 해제가 불가합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Scrollable vertical list for editing course favorites with checkboxes. Title bar at top, list items show checkbox state and course info. Manages internal toggle states. Mandatory courses cannot be unchecked.

components.name: WD_COURSE_EDITOR_ITEM
components.description: Individual checkbox list item for course editing. Shows checkbox icon, course title with optional pentagon, description text. Item height 68px. Supports checked/unchecked/mandatory states.
components.visualForm: Horizontal item layout: checkbox icon | course title (with optional pentagon) + description | visual states for selection
components.descriptionKo: 코스 편집용 체크박스 리스트의 개별 항목입니다. 체크박스 아이콘, 선택적 오각형이 있는 코스 타이틀, 설명 텍스트를 68px 높이로 표시하며, 체크/미체크/필수 상태를 지원합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Individual checkbox list item for course editing. Shows checkbox icon, course title with optional pentagon, description text. Item height 68px. Supports checked/unchecked/mandatory states.

components.name: WD_COURSE_ITEM
components.description: Complex course item displaying course name, type indicators (AI/Cloud/ThinQ), options list, and FastDL status. Supports multiple course types with distinct styling. Shows up to 4 course options. Animation for FastDL detecting state.
components.visualForm: Course item (310px width): title area with icons (AI/TM/Pentagon) → options list (up to 4) → optional FastDL status animation
components.descriptionKo: 코스 이름, 유형 표시기(AI/클라우드/ThinQ), 옵션 리스트, FastDL 상태를 표시하는 복합 코스 항목입니다. 여러 코스 유형과 최대 4개 옵션을 지원하며, FastDL 감지 중 애니메이션 상태를 제공합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Complex course item displaying course name, type indicators (AI/Cloud/ThinQ), options list, and FastDL status. Supports multiple course types with distinct styling. Shows up to 4 course options. Animation for FastDL detecting state.

components.name: WD_COURSE_ITEM_OPTION
components.description: Single course option display (name + value + unit) using NextFmtLabelLite. Shows formatted option text like 'Heavy Soil: 40°C'. Part of course item options list.
components.visualForm: Single line option text (21px, gray #cdcdcd) showing 'name: value unit' format
components.descriptionKo: NextFmtLabelLite를 사용해 단일 코스 옵션(이름+값+단위)을 표시하는 항목입니다. name: value unit 형식의 옵션 텍스트를 21px 회색으로 한 줄에 보여줍니다.
components.descriptionEn: Single course option display (name + value + unit) using NextFmtLabelLite. Shows formatted option text like 'Heavy Soil: 40°C'. Part of course item options list.

components.name: WD_COURSE_PROGRESS_BASE
components.description: Base component for course progress screens. Combines course title, remaining time, progress bar, status text, and indicators. Supports reservation mode with different time display. Complex layout with multiple sub-widgets. Animation for blinking status text.
components.visualForm: Multi-section vertical layout: course title → remaining/reservation time → progress bar → status text → description → indicators
components.descriptionKo: 코스 진행 화면의 기본 컴포넌트입니다. 코스 타이틀, 남은 시간, 프로그레스 바, 상태 텍스트, 인디케이터를 결합하며, 예약 모드 시 별도 시간 표시 방식을 지원합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Base component for course progress screens. Combines course title, remaining time, progress bar, status text, and indicators. Supports reservation mode with different time display. Complex layout with multiple sub-widgets. Animation for blinking status text.

components.name: WD_COURSE_PROGRESS_FINISH
components.description: Course completion screen with rotating content carousel. Shows course title and cycles through completion images, image sequences, and descriptions. Toggle period controls cycle speed. Theme-aware colors.
components.visualForm: Course title at top → rotating content slot (images/animations/text) cycling through completion assets
components.descriptionKo: 회전하는 콘텐츠 캐러셀이 있는 코스 완료 화면입니다. 코스 타이틀과 함께 완료 이미지, 이미지 시퀀스, 설명이 순환 표시되며 테마 색상을 지원합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Course completion screen with rotating content carousel. Shows course title and cycles through completion images, image sequences, and descriptions. Toggle period controls cycle speed. Theme-aware colors.

components.name: WD_COURSE_PROGRESS_TITLE
components.description: Course title component showing course name with optional AI/pentagon icons. Uses NextFmtLabelLite for formatted text with icon slots. Supports auto font sizing. Used in progress screens.
components.visualForm: Course name text (30px) with optional inline icons (AI: 15x15px, Pentagon: 18x18px)
components.descriptionKo: 선택적 AI/오각형 아이콘과 함께 코스 이름을 표시하는 코스 타이틀 컴포넌트입니다. NextFmtLabelLite로 인라인 아이콘 슬롯을 지원하며, 자동 폰트 크기 조정을 제공합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Course title component showing course name with optional AI/pentagon icons. Uses NextFmtLabelLite for formatted text with icon slots. Supports auto font sizing. Used in progress screens.

components.name: WD_COURSE_RUNNING
components.description: Active washing course display using WD_CourseProgressBase. Shows all course progress information during active wash cycle. Wrapper adding proper layout and dimensions to base component.
components.visualForm: Course progress display (310x240px) showing title, time, progress, status during wash
components.descriptionKo: WD_CourseProgressBase를 사용하는 세탁 코스 실행 중 표시 컴포넌트입니다. 세탁 주기가 활성화된 동안 모든 코스 진행 정보를 완전한 310x240px 레이아웃으로 보여주는 래퍼입니다.
components.descriptionEn: Active washing course display using WD_CourseProgressBase. Shows all course progress information during active wash cycle. Wrapper adding proper layout and dimensions to base component.

components.name: WD_DIALOG_ANIM_ICON
components.description: Dialogue with animated icon and multi-line text. Icon animation played via ImageSequencePlayer, text displayed below. Centered layout with keyboard support. Used for status messages with visual feedback.
components.visualForm: Centered animated icon (customizable size) → multi-line description text (25px) below
components.descriptionKo: 애니메이션 아이콘과 여러 줄 텍스트가 있는 다이얼로그입니다. ImageSequencePlayer로 아이콘 애니메이션을 재생하고 아래에 설명 텍스트를 표시합니다. 시각적 피드백이 필요한 상태 메시지에 사용됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Dialogue with animated icon and multi-line text. Icon animation played via ImageSequencePlayer, text displayed below. Centered layout with keyboard support. Used for status messages with visual feedback.

components.name: WD_DIALOG_TEXT_ONLY
components.description: Simple dialogue showing only centered multi-line text message. No icons, title, or buttons. Minimal component for brief messages. Supports keyboard back action.
components.visualForm: Centered multi-line text message (25px) on black background, no other UI elements
components.descriptionKo: 중앙 정렬된 여러 줄 텍스트 메시지만 표시하는 단순 다이얼로그입니다. 아이콘, 타이틀, 버튼 없이 간단한 메시지를 전달하며 키보드 뒤로 가기 액션을 지원합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Simple dialogue showing only centered multi-line text message. No icons, title, or buttons. Minimal component for brief messages. Supports keyboard back action.

components.name: WD_DIALOG_BASIC
components.description: Full-featured basic dialog with title, icon (warning/info/check/loading/custom image), description text, and optional bottom animation. Dynamic layout based on content. Icon size 62px, supports various types and custom sources.
components.visualForm: Vertical centered layout: title text → icon (62x62px or custom) → multi-line description → optional bottom animation
components.descriptionKo: 타이틀, 아이콘(경고/정보/체크/로딩/커스텀), 설명 텍스트, 선택적 하단 애니메이션을 갖춘 풀 기능 기본 다이얼로그입니다. 62px 아이콘을 지원하며 콘텐츠에 따라 레이아웃이 동적으로 조정됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Full-featured basic dialog with title, icon (warning/info/check/loading/custom image), description text, and optional bottom animation. Dynamic layout based on content. Icon size 62px, supports various types and custom sources.

components.name: WD_DIALOG_QRCODE
components.description: Error dialog displaying QR code for support links. Shows title text, centered QR code (scaled to 80% max size), and description below. QR code generated from URL prop using qrcode.react library.
components.visualForm: Vertical modal layout: title text (25px) → centered QR code (max 80% size) → description text below (21px)
components.descriptionKo: 지원 링크용 QR 코드를 표시하는 에러 다이얼로그입니다. 타이틀 텍스트, 중앙 정렬된 QR 코드, 하단 설명을 표시하며 qrcode.react 라이브러리로 URL에서 QR 코드를 생성합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Error dialog displaying QR code for support links. Shows title text, centered QR code (scaled to 80% max size), and description below. QR code generated from URL prop using qrcode.react library.

components.name: WD_DIALOG_UNLOCK
components.description: Child lock unlock dialog with lock icon animation and instruction text. Shows animated lock icon during unlock gesture. Changes icon and text when isUnlocking=true. Calls onComplete when unlocked.
components.visualForm: Centered lock icon animation (customizable) → instruction text below, visual changes during unlock process
components.descriptionKo: 잠금 해제 제스처 중 아이콘과 안내 텍스트가 변경되는 어린이 잠금 해제 다이얼로그입니다. isUnlocking=true 시 아이콘과 문구가 전환되며, 잠금 해제 완료 시 onComplete를 호출합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Child lock unlock dialog with lock icon animation and instruction text. Shows animated lock icon during unlock gesture. Changes icon and text when isUnlocking=true. Calls onComplete when unlocked.

components.name: WD_DECORATION_DIVIDER
components.description: Simple vertical divider line component for separating UI sections. Customizable height, width, position, and color. Basic visual separator element.
components.visualForm: Vertical line divider (customizable dimensions and color) for UI section separation
components.descriptionKo: UI 섹션을 구분하는 단순 수직 구분선 컴포넌트입니다. 높이, 너비, 위치, 색상을 설정할 수 있는 기본 시각적 분리 요소입니다.
components.descriptionEn: Simple vertical divider line component for separating UI sections. Customizable height, width, position, and color. Basic visual separator element.

components.name: WD_CLOCK_RESERVATION
components.description: Reservation finish time display combining course progress and reservation time. Shows when wash will complete with date, AM/PM, hour, minute. Includes course info and progress status. Theme-aware styling.
components.visualForm: Course info section → reservation time display (date, AM/PM, HH:MM) → progress information below
components.descriptionKo: 코스 진행 정보와 예약 완료 시간을 함께 표시하는 세탁 예약 위젯입니다. 날짜, AM/PM, 시/분과 코스 정보를 통합해 보여주며 테마 색상을 지원합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Reservation finish time display combining course progress and reservation time. Shows when wash will complete with date, AM/PM, hour, minute. Includes course info and progress status. Theme-aware styling.

components.name: WD_CLOCK_RESERVATION_TIME
components.description: Reservation time display component showing date, AM/PM indicator, and time (HH:MM format). Used within WD_FinishReservation. Theme colors for AM/PM (orange/blue).
components.visualForm: Three-line display: date text → AM/PM (colored) → HH:MM time (large font)
components.descriptionKo: 날짜, AM/PM 표시기, 시간(HH:MM)을 3행으로 표시하는 예약 시간 컴포넌트입니다. WD_FinishReservation에서 사용되며 AM/PM에 테마 색상(주황색/파란색)을 적용합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Reservation time display component showing date, AM/PM indicator, and time (HH:MM format). Used within WD_FinishReservation. Theme colors for AM/PM (orange/blue).

components.name: OV_PROGRESS_COOKING
components.description: Oven cooking progress screen. Shows cooking title, countdown timer (HH:MM:SS, collapses to MM:SS or :SS when hour/min=0), progress bar, status text, notification bar (temperature/weight, steam icon, rack+accessory icons via CookOptionImage table), and guide text.
components.visualForm: 320x240px black: OV_TITLE_2Line at top -> HH:MM:SS digit row (y=29, h=81) -> progress bar (y=149) -> status text (y=164, 28px) -> notification icons row (centered+9px) -> guide text (y=203, 28px)
components.descriptionKo: OV_PROGRESS_COOKING 위젯입니다. 카테고리는 Oven/Progress입니다. 오븐 조리 진행 화면으로, 조리 타이틀, 남은 시간(HH:MM:SS 자동 축약), 프로그레스 바, 상태 텍스트, 알림 아이콘(온도/무게/스팀/선반/부속품), 하단 안내 문구를 표시합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Oven cooking progress screen: title, countdown (HH:MM:SS auto-collapse), progress bar, status text, notification icons (temp/weight, steam, rack/accessory via CookOptionImage), guide text.

components.name: WD_PAGER_BASE
components.description: Base horizontal pager component for multi-page content. Manages page state, transitions (300ms), and page indicators. Children rendered as full-width pages. Navigation via arrow keys. Foundation for other pager widgets.
components.visualForm: Horizontal page container with smooth transitions, page indicator dots at top, full-width pages (310px)
components.descriptionKo: 다중 페이지 콘텐츠를 위한 수평 페이저 기반 컴포넌트입니다. 페이지 상태, 300ms 전환, 페이지 인디케이터를 관리하며, 자식 요소를 310px 전체 너비 페이지로 렌더링합니다. 다른 페이저 위젯의 기반이 됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Base horizontal pager component for multi-page content. Manages page state, transitions (300ms), and page indicators. Children rendered as full-width pages. Navigation via arrow keys. Foundation for other pager widgets.

components.name: WD_PROGRESS_BAR
components.description: Horizontal progress bar widget for washer dryer. Shows progress percentage with visual bar animation. Theme-aware colors (blue/orange). Smooth progress updates with translateX animation.
components.visualForm: Horizontal bar indicator showing progress percentage with animated fill, theme-colored
components.descriptionKo: 세탁기/건조기용 수평 프로그레스 바 위젯입니다. translateX 애니메이션으로 진행률을 시각적으로 표시하며 파란색/주황색 테마 색상을 지원합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Horizontal progress bar widget for washer dryer. Shows progress percentage with visual bar animation. Theme-aware colors (blue/orange). Smooth progress updates with translateX animation.

components.name: WD_PROGRESS_CIRCLE
components.description: Circular progress indicator with percentage display, center icon, and description text. Arc animates around circle showing progress (0-100%). Status icon shown in center. Used for cycle progress.
components.visualForm: Circular arc progress ring → center status icon → description text below, percentage displayed
components.descriptionKo: 원형 호 애니메이션으로 진행률(0~100%)을 표시하는 원형 진행 지시자입니다. 중앙에 상태 아이콘, 하단에 설명 텍스트를 배치하며, 세탁 주기 진행 화면에 사용됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Circular progress indicator with percentage display, center icon, and description text. Arc animates around circle showing progress (0-100%). Status icon shown in center. Used for cycle progress.

components.name: WD_PROGRESS_SOTA
components.description: SOTA firmware upgrade progress display with title, percentage, and loading animation. Shows update progress during over-the-air software updates. Theme-aware styling.
components.visualForm: Title text → progress percentage display → loading animation indicator
components.descriptionKo: 타이틀, 퍼센트 표시, 로딩 애니메이션이 있는 SOTA 펌웨어 업그레이드 진행 화면입니다. OTA 소프트웨어 업데이트 진행 상황을 보여주며 테마 색상을 지원합니다.
components.descriptionEn: SOTA firmware upgrade progress display with title, percentage, and loading animation. Shows update progress during over-the-air software updates. Theme-aware styling.

components.name: WD_PROGRESS_REMAIN_TIME
components.description: Remaining time display showing hours and minutes with large animated digits. Uses DigitAnim components for smooth number transitions. Includes 'hr' and 'min' unit labels. Shows time left in current operation.
components.visualForm: Large animated digit display: [H]H → 'hr' → [M]M → 'min' with smooth digit transitions
components.descriptionKo: 대형 애니메이션 숫자로 남은 시간(시/분)을 표시합니다. DigitAnim 컴포넌트로 시간 변경 시 부드러운 숫자 슬라이드 전환을 구현하며 hr과 min 단위 레이블을 포함합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Remaining time display showing hours and minutes with large animated digits. Uses DigitAnim components for smooth number transitions. Includes 'hr' and 'min' unit labels. Shows time left in current operation.

components.name: CM_PICKER_ROLLER
components.description: Vertical roller picker component (iOS-style picker wheel). Shows 3 items with center selection. Supports infinite wrapping, smooth scroll animations. Used in clock setting and value selection. Divider lines mark selection area.
components.visualForm: 3-slot vertical picker with dividers (68px items), center item selected, smooth scrolling with wrapping
components.descriptionKo: 3개 항목이 중앙 선택 방식으로 표시되는 세로 롤러 피커(iOS 스타일 피커 휠)입니다. 무한 감기와 부드러운 스크롤 애니메이션을 지원하며, 시계 설정이나 값 선택에 활용됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Vertical roller picker component (iOS-style picker wheel). Shows 3 items with center selection. Supports infinite wrapping, smooth scroll animations. Used in clock setting and value selection. Divider lines mark selection area.

components.name: WD_ANIM_SENSING
components.description: Fabric sensing display with intro→loop animation and rotating status descriptions. Shows sensing operation animation with text cycling through detection messages. Uses imgseqopt_Intro_Loop for animation.
components.visualForm: Centered sensing animation (intro then loop) → rotating description text below showing detection status
components.descriptionKo: 인트로→루프 애니메이션과 순환하는 상태 설명이 있는 섬유 감지 화면 위젯입니다. 감지 동작 중 애니메이션과 함께 감지 메시지가 교대로 표시됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Fabric sensing display with intro→loop animation and rotating status descriptions. Shows sensing operation animation with text cycling through detection messages. Uses imgseqopt_Intro_Loop for animation.

components.name: WD_CLOCK_PICKER
components.description: Time picker component using three WD_Roller pickers for hour, minute, and AM/PM selection. Manages time state internally. Converts between 12/24 hour formats. Fires onChange with hour/minute/isPM values.
components.visualForm: Three horizontal roller pickers: hour (1-12) | minute (00-59) | AM/PM selector
components.descriptionKo: 세 개의 WD_Roller 피커로 시/분/AM·PM을 선택하는 시간 피커 컴포넌트입니다. 12/24시간 형식 변환을 내부에서 처리하며, onChange로 hour/minute/isPM 값을 전달합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Time picker component using three WD_Roller pickers for hour, minute, and AM/PM selection. Manages time state internally. Converts between 12/24 hour formats. Fires onChange with hour/minute/isPM values.

components.name: WD_TOAST_MESSAGE
components.description: Individual toast message component (used by CM_Dialog_Toast_Holder). Shows formatted text in dark gray rounded rectangle. Auto-sized height based on text lines. Supports format slots.
components.visualForm: Dark gray rounded rectangle (310px width, auto height) with centered white text (25px)
components.descriptionKo: 개별 토스트 메시지 컴포넌트입니다. 어두운 회색 둥근 사각형(310px)에 흰색 텍스트(25px)를 표시하며, 텍스트 줄 수에 따라 높이가 자동 조정됩니다. CM_Dialog_Toast_Holder에서 사용됩니다.
components.descriptionEn: Individual toast message component (used by CM_Dialog_Toast_Holder). Shows formatted text in dark gray rounded rectangle. Auto-sized height based on text lines. Supports format slots.

components.name: WD_PROGRESS_VALVE_CHECK
components.description: Water valve check progress display showing percentage and description. Theme-aware colors. Shows status during water inlet valve testing. Simple progress indicator.
components.visualForm: Vertically centered: progress percentage display → description text below
components.descriptionKo: 수도 유입 밸브 점검 진행 상황을 표시하는 위젯입니다. 퍼센트와 설명 텍스트를 중앙 정렬로 표시하며 테마 색상을 지원합니다.
components.descriptionEn: Water valve check progress display showing percentage and description. Theme-aware colors. Shows status during water inlet valve testing. Simple progress indicator.
